ratings.comment: She was one of the most unprofessional professors I've ever had. She openly shamed me and other students. Her lectures made me more confused than if I just didn't go. The content isn't even difficult, her teaching is just so bad. When you ask questions she is unhelpful. I wouldn't recommend taking her section if you have a choice.

Do not take a class with Jenny Wei, she does not teach or explain things well and if you ask her questions, she usually does not know the answer. This class is extremely homework heavy and there's a quiz every class that requires you to come to class. She is also quite rude to students and is not considerate.
